1792630.name: [NEVVREAL CLASSIC] Violinist Jiwon Song
1792630.description:
This app is Classical Music of VR Realistic content.
Do you know Jiwon Song?
She's Korean and she's a top-notch violinist
K-Classic is the best of the world's classical music
You can hear the violinist 'Jiwon Song' playing
This is not game, it's educational app.
Experience beyond R seats that cannot be experienced in reality
You can view general video, 360 degree video, close-up video, and special interview video in this 'Violinist Jiwon Song'
And You can learn more about how to play the violin and performance skills.
If you see the special interview, you'll be able to see what kind of violinist Jiwon Song is.
This app will give you the best classical music performance you've ever seen
You can use this app on Steam, OculusGo, HTC Vive
Enjoy~

The title of the songs
S. Prokofiev - Violin Sonata No. 2 in D Major, Op. 94a mov. 2 Scherzo. Presto and mov 4 Allegro con brio


Thankyou
Have a good day :)
1792630.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
